ground_truth.title: How Much Does Therapy Cost in California? → Cost Per Session & More
ground_truth.author: Elisa Martinez, LMFT
ground_truth.main_content: Curious to see how much therapy costs in California before getting started? Here's a breakdown of what to expect. This article provides comprehensive information about therapy costs in California, including cost per session details and what factors influence pricing. Whether you're seeking online therapy for anxiety, burnout, or trauma, understanding the investment in your mental health is an important first step. The content covers typical session rates, insurance considerations, and options for different budgets in the California area.
